name: GET /api/leads/:id/execution - Read a lead's workflow execution cursor
description: Operator-facing read endpoint that returns the canonical lead record alongside its WorkflowExecutionState — current step + next step + progress percent — for the lead-to-customer workflow (default; the optional ?workflow=<slug> query selects another). Powers the Workflow card on the admin-cockpit Lead Detail screen.
skipReason: lead-service runs on port 4011 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

testCases.name: Read execution state for a freshly captured lead
